pi_items.source: setup_azure_devops.ps1 line 138 creates project with name 'TailwindTraders'
setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 311-312 creates default repo named 'TailwindTraders'

privileged_info_summary: The TailwindTraders project and repository are successfully created by the Azure DevOps environment setup script. However, a critical discrepancy exists: the environment script creates a branch named 'feature/add-search-endpoint' containing Flask API code, while the task metadata claims the branch is 'feature/contact-page'. The task references files (contact.js and style.css) that do not exist in the repository data directory, and critical task-specific setup files (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) are missing from the task directory, making it impossible to verify the PR ID (2), expected hex code (#f5f5f5), forbidden JavaScript pattern (console.log), and reply keyword (backlog) claims.
